chain.thought: Explanation: Interpret “success” as wins by Air Force in the listed era (1980–2013). Air Force is the winning team in 20 rows; this also matches the series change from AFA 11–7–1 to AFA 31–20–1 (an increase of 20 wins).

judge_thought:
Explanation:
The “series” column shows the cumulative series record in the format “afa X–Y–1,” where X is Air Force wins and Y is Colorado State wins. In the most recent entry (2013), the series is “afa 31–20–1,” indicating Colorado State has 20 wins. Interpreting “success” as wins for the other group in the series, the number is 20.
